//edit: Replace SERVER_IP and export GLM_API_KEY (the contents of ~/.glm-api-key on the server).
//critical: limit.context MUST be set BELOW the server's --ctx-size (serve-glm.sh CTX). It makes
//critical2: opencode auto-COMPACT before it hits the server ceiling. Without it, opencode assumes a
//critical3: huge window, balloons the context to 100k+ tokens, and the server grinds for HOURS (O(n^2)
//critical4: prompt-processing). Server CTX 64k -> set context 60000. If you raise one, raise both.
